response.text:
ACCEPT
rationale: Accepting incoming offers aligns with my stated recovery strategy to rebuild trust and increase SoC above 50% before resuming outbound sharing.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a OFFER from r2c5. Payload: {'kwh': 1.25}. Their rationale: SoC 11.50/37 kWh (0.31 frac) above 0.30 threshold; sharing 5.00 kW via geographic circle to below-mean-SoC peer..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.9, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: r0c5 and r2c5 are offering energy but rejecting my requests due to false hoarding accusations; I must accept all incoming offers and avoid any outbound sharing until SoC recovers above 50% to rebuild trust..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
